text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you. I'm somewhat surprised that you
actually remembered.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Surprised? Who wouldn't remember the birthday
of their good friend?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And as proof of my sincerity, I even got you a
present.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I wonder if you'll accept it. It might not be
good enough for the great King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly. I would never think it beneath me
to accept a gift from someone so thoughtful
toward their friends.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Go on, don't be shy now. I'll have your present,
whatever it is!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, great. I really put a lot of effort into this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Here's one "Seiun Sky can tell King what to do"
coupon!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hah, a homemade coupon is a real... Wait.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why in the world would I have to do what you say?! That's just backwards!
